chapter_goal: Make the quadric line complex visible through rank strata, Plucker coordinates, line-complex equations, Kummer configurations, and rationality/group-law checks.

visual_sequence.concept: Quadrics and linear systems of quadrics
visual_sequence.inspection_target: rank changes when determinant factors vanish
visual_sequence.invariant: matrix ranks and determinant polynomial agree with sampled strata
visual_sequence.representation: rank-stratification heatmap and pencil determinant ledger

visual_sequence.concept: Grassmannian G(2,4), Klein quadric, and line complexes
visual_sequence.inspection_target: sampled lines satisfy the Klein relation and line-complex equation values are visible
visual_sequence.invariant: Klein relation is zero for every sampled line
visual_sequence.representation: Plucker coordinate ledger with HTML explorer

visual_sequence.concept: Kummer surface, singular lines, and two configurations
visual_sequence.inspection_target: singular nodes and trope-like blocks form a structured incidence pattern
visual_sequence.invariant: each sampled block has the expected incidence count
visual_sequence.representation: incidence graph with sixteen nodes grouped by configuration

visual_sequence.concept: Variety of lines, group law, and rationality reprise
visual_sequence.inspection_target: parameter operations stay on the model curve and rational map has invertible sample away from exceptional values
visual_sequence.representation: parameter map and chord-style group scaffold
